mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user (id, username, nickname, avatar, password, gender, bio, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{user.id}, #{user.username}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.avatar}, #{user.password}, #{user.gender}, #{user.bio}, #{user.status}, #{user.createdAt}, #{user.updatedAt})
